name: Cohesiv
notes: HQ in London, Ontario, Canada. Operating as Factory Bucket Inc. / Cohesiv, builds no-code manufacturing/warehousing software.

name: Linq
notes: Founded 2019 in Birmingham, AL by ex-Shipt executives. Originally a digital business card platform, recently pivoted to AI-powered messaging API embedded in iMessage/SMS. Raised $27.76M total.

name: Beyond Reach Labs
notes: YC W26 company. Builds space solar arrays and deployable thermal radiators for orbital power. HQ confirmed Pittsburgh, PA by PitchBook and local Pittsburgh news coverage.

name: Anon
notes: Founded 2023 by Daniel Mason and Kai Aichholz. Builds an integration/web automation platform for AI agents to authenticate and act on behalf of users. Raised $6.5M from Union Square Ventures and others.

name: Lazy Skincare
notes: Could not identify a specific startup named 'Lazy Skincare'. Multiple unrelated skincare brands use 'Lazy' in their name (Lazy Skinscience, LazyBum Skincare, LAZ Skincare, Lazy Girl, etc.). No Crunchbase/PitchBook profile found for an exact 'Lazy Skincare' company. Industry assigned as best guess from name.

name: Plantiful
notes: Plantiful Technologies Inc., founded 2022 by David Turer and David Heller. Cloud-based software for the plant grower and wholesaler industry. HQ confirmed New York, NY. Also has plantiful.ai.

name: Stretch
notes: Highly ambiguous name with many unrelated companies: Stretch (semiconductor, Sunnyvale CA), Stretch Technologies (family organizer, Austin TX), Stretch*d (assisted stretching, New York), getstretch.ai (gym WhatsApp automation, London UK), StretchLab (Santa Monica CA). Cannot identify which 'Stretch' this CRM record refers to without additional context such as domain or industry.

name: Vize Social
notes: Found website vize.social which describes itself as making 'creation playful'. Domain confirmed but company HQ location could not be established. Multiple unrelated 'Vize' companies exist (Tijuana-based workforce startup, London-based image recognition firm); the vize.social entity appears distinct. Location remains unknown.

name: Silvr.ai
notes: French fintech startup (revenue-based financing). HQ at 144 Av Charles de Gaulle, Neuilly-sur-Seine, France. Raised €130M. Also opened Berlin office. Not a US company.

name: Revamp
notes: YC S23. AI-powered customer segmentation for eCommerce. Founded 2023 by Stephen Campbell. HQ San Francisco, CA. Website and domain already present in input.

name: Sentience
notes: Multiple companies named 'Sentience': Sentience Technology (Daly City, CA; automated user behavior analysis), The Sentience Company (Newark, DE; personal AI/digital memory, raised $6.5M), and a Seoul-based gaming AI company. Without domain or additional context, cannot determine which record this is.

name: Tio Magic
source: tiomagic.com/contact-us; rocketreach.co (founder Jose Marcial Portilla); linkedin.com/company/tio-magic-company
notes: HQ at 577 2nd St, San Francisco, CA 94107. Creates personalized illustrated storybooks and animated stories for children using personalization technology. Also offers a child-safe YouTube filter. Founded by Jose Marcial Portilla.
